# API Documentation

*Generated by Veld*

## Modules

- [IAM](#iam)
- [Accounts](#accounts)
- [Transactions](#transactions)
- [Cards](#cards)
- [Lending](#lending)
- [Notifications](#notifications)

## IAM

Identity and Access Management — authentication and user profiles

| Method | Path | Name | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| `POST` | `/api/iam/register` | Register | Create a new NexusBank user account |
| `POST` | `/api/iam/login` | Login | Authenticate and receive a JWT token pair |
| `POST` | `/api/iam/refresh` | RefreshToken | Exchange a refresh token for a new access token |
| `GET` | `/api/iam/me` | GetProfile | Return the currently authenticated user |
| `PATCH` | `/api/iam/me` | UpdateProfile | Update name or phone on the authenticated user |
| `POST` | `/api/iam/logout` | Logout | Invalidate the current session token |

## Accounts

Bank account management — open, view, freeze, and close accounts

| Method | Path | Name | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/accounts/` | ListAccounts | List all accounts for the authenticated user |
| `GET` | `/api/accounts/:id` | GetAccount | Fetch a single account by ID |
| `POST` | `/api/accounts/` | CreateAccount | Open a new checking, savings, or investment account |
| `GET` | `/api/accounts/summary` | GetSummary | Portfolio summary — total balance and primary account |
| `POST` | `/api/accounts/:id/freeze` | FreezeAccount | Freeze an account to block all future transactions |
| `DELETE` | `/api/accounts/:id` | CloseAccount | Permanently close an account |
| `POST` | `/api/accounts/ban` | banaccount |  |

## Transactions

Transaction history and funds transfers

| Method | Path | Name | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/transactions/account/:accountId` | GetHistory | Paginated transaction history for a specific account |
| `GET` | `/api/transactions/:id` | GetTransaction | Retrieve a single transaction record by ID |
| `POST` | `/api/transactions/transfer` | Transfer | Initiate a funds transfer to another IBAN |

## Cards

Payment card management — request, view, freeze, and cancel

| Method | Path | Name | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/cards/` | ListCards | List all cards for the authenticated user |
| `GET` | `/api/cards/:id` | GetCard | Retrieve a single card by ID |
| `POST` | `/api/cards/` | RequestCard | Request a new debit or credit card linked to an account |
| `POST` | `/api/cards/:id/freeze` | FreezeCard | Temporarily freeze a card to block all usage |
| `DELETE` | `/api/cards/:id` | CancelCard | Permanently cancel a card |

## Lending

Loan management — apply, track, and repay loans

| Method | Path | Name | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/lending/` | ListLoans | List all active and historical loans for the authenticated user |
| `GET` | `/api/lending/:id` | GetLoan | Retrieve details of a specific loan by ID |
| `POST` | `/api/lending/apply` | ApplyForLoan | Submit a loan application for underwriting review |
| `POST` | `/api/lending/repay` | MakePayment | Submit a scheduled or early repayment against an active loan |

## Notifications

User notifications and per-category preference management

| Method | Path | Name | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/notifications/` | ListNotifications | List all notifications for the authenticated user |
| `PATCH` | `/api/notifications/:id/read` | MarkAsRead | Mark a specific notification as read |
| `GET` | `/api/notifications/preferences` | GetPreferences | Return the user's notification channel preferences |
| `PATCH` | `/api/notifications/preferences` | UpdatePreferences | Update one or more notification category preferences |

## Models

### User

A registered NexusBank user

| Field | Type | Optional | Default |
|-------|------|----------|---------|
| id | `string` |  |  |
| email | `string` |  |  |
| firstName | `string` |  |  |
| lastName | `string` |  |  |
| phone | `string` | yes |  |
| createdAt | `string` |  |  |

### RegisterInput

New user registration payload

| Field | Type | Optional | Default |
|-------|------|----------|---------|
| email | `string` |  |  |
| password | `string` |  |  |
| firstName | `string` |  |  |
| lastName | `string` |  |  |
| phone | `string` | yes |  |

### LoginInput

Credentials for email/password authentication

| Field | Type | Optional | Default |
|-------|------|----------|---------|
| email | `string` |  |  |
| password | `string` |  |  |

### TokenPair

JWT access + refresh token pair

| Field | Type | Optional | Default |
|-------|------|----------|---------|
| accessToken | `string` |  |  |
| refreshToken | `string` |  |  |
| expiresIn | `int` |  |  |

### RefreshInput

Payload to exchange a refresh token for a new access token

| Field | Type | Optional | Default |
|-------|------|----------|---------|
| refreshToken | `string` |  |  |

### UpdateProfileInput

Fields the user may update on their own profile

| Field | Type | Optional | Default |
|-------|------|----------|---------|
| firstName | `string` | yes |  |
| lastName | `string` | yes |  |
| phone | `string` | yes |  |

| transaction | `bool` | yes |  |

| marketing | `bool` | yes |  |

## Enums

### AccountType

Values: `checking`, `savings`, `investment`

### AccountStatus

Values: `active`, `frozen`, `closed`

### TransactionType

Values: `credit`, `debit`, `transfer`

### TransactionStatus

Values: `pending`, `completed`, `failed`, `reversed`

### CardType

Values: `debit`, `credit`

### CardStatus

Values: `active`, `frozen`, `cancelled`

### CardNetwork

Values: `visa`, `mastercard`

### LoanStatus

Values: `pending`, `approved`, `active`, `paid_off`, `rejected`

### NotificationType

Values: `transaction`, `security`, `marketing`, `system`
